'''鈭歠-f-j-th''' ('''kafafjethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centre|centre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centre|centre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-f-j-th
|-
! Lemma
| kafafjethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafjethoko|thifafjethoko]] || [[word:jifafjethoko|jifafjethoko]] || [[word:shifafjethoko|shifafjethoko]] || [[word:kifafjethoko|kifafjethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufafjethoko|thuthufafjethoko]] || [[word:jujufafjethoko|jujufafjethoko]] || [[word:shushufafjethoko|shushufafjethoko]] || [[word:kukufafjethoko|kukufafjethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufafjethoko|thufafjethoko]] || [[word:jufafjethoko|jufafjethoko]] || [[word:shufafjethoko|shufafjethoko]] || [[word:kufafjethoko|kufafjethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufafjethoko|thufafjethoko]] || [[word:jufafjethoko|jufafjethoko]] || [[word:shufafjethoko|shufafjethoko]] || [[word:kufafjethoko|kufafjethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefafjethoko|thefafjethoko]] || [[word:jefafjethoko|jefafjethoko]] || [[word:shefafjethoko|shefafjethoko]] || [[word:kefafjethoko|kefafjethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofafjethoko|thothofafjethoko]] || [[word:jojofafjethoko|jojofafjethoko]] || [[word:shoshofafjethoko|shoshofafjethoko]] || [[word:kokofafjethoko|kokofafjethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofafjethoko|thofafjethoko]] || [[word:jofafjethoko|jofafjethoko]] || [[word:shofafjethoko|shofafjethoko]] || [[word:kofafjethoko|kofafjethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofafjethoko|thofafjethoko]] || [[word:jofafjethoko|jofafjethoko]] || [[word:shofafjethoko|shofafjethoko]] || [[word:kofafjethoko|kofafjethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fafjethoko|th忙fafjethoko]] || [[word:j忙fafjethoko|j忙fafjethoko]] || [[word:sh忙fafjethoko|sh忙fafjethoko]] || [[word:k忙fafjethoko|k忙fafjethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafafjethoko|thathafafjethoko]] || [[word:jajafafjethoko|jajafafjethoko]] || [[word:shashafafjethoko|shashafafjethoko]] || [[word:kakafafjethoko|kakafafjethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafafjethoko|thafafjethoko]] || [[word:jafafjethoko|jafafjethoko]] || [[word:shafafjethoko|shafafjethoko]] || [[word:kafafjethoko|kafafjethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafjethoko|thafafjethoko]] || [[word:jafafjethoko|jafafjethoko]] || [[word:shafafjethoko|shafafjethoko]] || [[word:kafafjethoko|kafafjethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafafjethithi|shafafjethithi]] || [[word:shafafjethiji|shafafjethiji]] || [[word:shafafjethishi|shafafjethishi]] || [[word:shafafjethiki|shafafjethiki]]
